gxio/pka.h File Reference

Public Key Authentication Acceleration and True Random Number Generator MiCA driver support functions. More...


Data Structures

struct  pka_vector_t
 A data vector. More...
struct  pka_cmd_desc_t
 A PKA command descriptor. More...
struct  pka_res_desc_t
 The result descriptor. More...
struct  gxio_mica_pka_context_t
 A context object used to manage MiCA PKA hardware resources. More...
struct  gxio_mica_pka_trng_context_t
 A context object used to manage MiCA PKA TRNG hardware resources. More...
struct  gxio_mica_pka_ring_config_t
 Describes how to configure a PKA engine's command result rings. More...

Defines

#define PKA_NUM_RINGS   4
 The maximum number of command/result rings supported by the hardware.

Functions

int gxio_mica_pka_init (gxio_mica_pka_context_t *context, int mica_index, gxio_mica_pka_ring_config_t *ring_config)
 Initialize context, and initialize PKA engine's rings.
int gxio_mica_pka_command_slots_available (gxio_mica_pka_context_t *context, int ring)
 Determine if a PKA ring has room for a new command.
int gxio_mica_pka_put_command_on_ring (gxio_mica_pka_context_t *context, int ring, pka_cmd_desc_t *cmd)
 Put a command on a ring to be executed.
int gxio_mica_pka_results_available (gxio_mica_pka_context_t *context, int ring)
 Determine if a result is available on a PKA ring.
int gxio_mica_pka_get_result_from_ring (gxio_mica_pka_context_t *context, int ring, pka_res_desc_t *res)
 Get a PKA result from a ring.
int gxio_mica_pka_cfg_cmd_queue_empty_interrupt (gxio_mica_pka_context_t *context, int target_cpu, int target_event, int ring)
 Configure an interrupt to fire when the command queue is empty.
int gxio_mica_pka_cfg_res_queue_full_interrupt (gxio_mica_pka_context_t *context, int target_cpu, int target_event, int ring)
 Configure an interrupt to fire when the result ring has results.
void gxio_mica_pka_read_interrupts (gxio_mica_pka_context_t *context, uint32_t *interrupts)
 Read the PKA interrupt status bits.
void gxio_mica_pka_reset_interrupts (gxio_mica_pka_context_t *context, uint32_t interrupts)
 Reset the selected PKA interrupts.
int gxio_mica_pka_trng_init (gxio_mica_pka_trng_context_t *context, int mica_index)
 Initialize the TRNG hardware module and return a handle that allows access it.
int gxio_mica_pka_trng_data_present (gxio_mica_pka_trng_context_t *context)
 Determine if a random number is available in the TRNG.
int gxio_mica_pka_trng_read32 (gxio_mica_pka_trng_context_t *context, uint32_t *data)
 Obtain a new 32-bit random integer.
int gxio_mica_pka_trng_read64 (gxio_mica_pka_trng_context_t *context, uint64_t *data)
 Obtain a new 64-bit random integer.

Detailed Description

Public Key Authentication Acceleration and True Random Number Generator MiCA driver support functions.
